response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical fundamentals and substantial production-scale experience across multiple domains, including real-time systems at Dunnhumby and large-scale optimization at Optilyz. However, he lacks explicit experimentation platform, metrics infrastructure, and telemetry system experience—core to this Principal role. His background shows a full-stack generalist trajectory rather than specialization in growth/experimentation domains. While capable of learning the domain, the specific expertise gap and missing Python proficiency represent notable concerns for an IC6-level position focused on foundational experimentation systems.
strengths: 20+ years of production-scale engineering across diverse domains with demonstrated ability to own and ship large systems
Staff-level technical leadership with proven willingness to remain hands-on and write production code
Expertise in building infrastructure and platforms that serve multiple teams (GISCollective, Optilyz pricing systems, Dunnhumby microservices)
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or measurement platforms—critical to the role's core responsibilities
Missing explicit metrics, telemetry, or statistical analysis background needed for growth/experimentation leadership and guardrails design
No Python listed despite being a required language; career shows full-stack generalist focus rather than specialization in growth or data systems

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and data aptitude demonstrated in resume
